headline: WV Guardsman Andrew Wolfe 👮‍♂️🩸 SLOWLY HEALING 💪🙏 After DC Ambush 😵💥
text:
Air Force Staff Sgt Andrew Wolfe 🛡️✈️, 24yo WV HUNK 💪😍, is SLOWLY HEALING 🩹🔥 from that NASTY HEAD WOUND 🧠💥 after getting AMBUSHED 😱🔫 like a bad action flick near White House 🏛️🚨 last month! Fam says he's starting to LOOK MORE LIKE HIMSELF 👦✨ – no more zombie vibes 🧟‍♂️❌, thumbs-up 👍 to nurses and TOE WIGGLES 🦶😜 earlier this week! Acute care LOCKDOWN 🏥🔒 for 2-3 more weeks, but parents Jason & Melody Wolfe 📜❤️ spilling TEA ☕: 'LONG ROAD AHEAD 🛣️😩 but FAITH GOT US HOPING 🙏✨ – prayers from WORLDWIDE SIMPS 🥺🌍 pouring in!' Gov Patrick Morrisey 🗣️🇺🇸 hyping the VIGIL 🔥🕯️ at old alma mater Musselman High 🏫📚 in Inwood WV, pastor DROPPING those parental BARS 🎤💌!

Tragic AF 😢💔: Wolfe's squadmate Sarah Beckstrom 👩‍✈️💔, just 20yo BABE 😇, got straight BODIED ☠️ by the hail of bullets! Shooter? Afghan import Rahmanullah Lakanwal 🇦🇫🔫 – ex-CIA-backed counterterror STUD 🕵️‍♂️💣 who rolled with Yanks in Afghan sandbox 🏜️🪖 before 2021 visa glow-up 📈🛂! Cops SLAPPED him with FIRST-DEGREE MURDER 🔪💀 and ASSAULT INTENT 😈 – DC streets turning into Wild West 🤠🔫!

Trump Daddy 🍊🛡️ called in 2K National Guard BADASSES 🛡️🇺🇸 back in August to CRACK DOWN 🥊🚔 on Dem city CHAOS 🏙️🔥 – immigration INVASION & crime WAVE 🌊🍆! Post-shooting, Donnie DEMANDS 500 MORE TROOPS 💪📈 to DC, citing this as PRIME REASON for IMMIGRATION PURGE 🚫🛂! Trump admin GOING HAM 🥓: CANCELLED all citizenship parties 🎉❌ for 19 travel-ban countries including Afghanistan 🇦🇫🚫 – no more green cards for risky imports! 👋💨 Morrisey begging ALL WV peeps & 'MURICANS 🙌🇺🇸 for PRAYERS 🔮 – Guardsman Wolfe FIGHTING BACK like a boss 🥊😤, slowly mooning recovery 🍑🌕! Hold the line, bros – faith over fear 🙏⚔️, Trump troops OWNING the streets 🚀🛡️!
